mathmodels 0.0.9
  • Reference
    • Getting Started with mathmodels
    • 📖 User Guide (Online Book)
  • News

SEIR Epidemic Model

Source: R/diffEq_models.R
model_seir.Rd

Four-compartment model that adds an exposed (latent) class: $$\frac{dS}{dt} = -\beta S I$$ $$\frac{dE}{dt} = \beta S I - \alpha E$$ $$\frac{dI}{dt} = \alpha E - \gamma I$$ $$\frac{dR}{dt} = \gamma I$$

Usage

model_seir(init, params, times, ...)

Arguments

init

Named numeric vector. R defaults to 0 if omitted, e.g. c(S = 980, E = 10, I = 10).

params

Named numeric vector, e.g. c(beta = 0.3, alpha = 0.2, gamma = 0.1).

beta

Transmission rate.

alpha

Rate of progression from exposed to infectious (1/alpha = mean latent period).

gamma

Recovery rate (1/gamma = mean infectious period).

times

Numeric vector of output times.

...

Additional arguments passed to ode_solver.

Value

A data.frame with columns time, S, E, I, R.

Details

  • S Susceptible — not yet infected.

  • E Exposed — infected but not yet infectious (mean latent period \(1/\alpha\)).

  • I Infectious — actively spreading the pathogen (mean infectious period \(1/\gamma\)).

  • R Recovered — permanently immune.

Population size \(N = S + E + I + R\) is conserved.

Examples

model_seir(
  init   = c(S = 980, E = 10, I = 10),
  params = c(beta = 0.3, alpha = 0.2, gamma = 0.1),
  times  = seq(0, 50, by = 0.1)
)
#>     time             S            E         I           R
#> 1    0.0  9.800000e+02  10.00000000  10.00000   0.0000000
#> 2    0.1  7.050222e+02 282.01648472  12.85158   0.1097745
#> 3    0.2  4.299174e+02 548.80558766  21.00235   0.2746527
#> 4    0.3  1.901901e+02 775.15717081  34.10625   0.5465094
#> 5    0.4  5.369344e+01 894.75906474  50.57940   0.9680880
#> 6    0.5  9.040107e+00 921.14804504  68.24989   1.5619604
#> 7    0.6  8.954432e-01 910.94614689  85.82575   2.3326627
#> 8    0.7  5.270346e-02 893.73930854 102.93111   3.2768776
#> 9    0.8  1.871324e-03 876.09218405 119.51640   4.3895475
#> 10   0.9  4.072687e-05 858.74619978 135.58827   5.6654939
#> 11   1.0  5.561301e-07 841.74192143 151.15844   7.0996377
#> 12   1.1  1.343967e-09 825.07431627 166.23866   8.6870275
#> 13   1.2  3.473686e-07 808.73676153 180.84041  10.4228255
#> 14   1.3  2.711134e-08 792.72269977 194.97501  12.3022864
#> 15   1.4 -2.972845e-09 777.02572647 208.65348  14.3207956
#> 16   1.5  5.712045e-09 761.63958698 221.88655  16.4738632
#> 17   1.6 -2.542320e-09 746.55811678 234.68480  18.7570814
#> 18   1.7 -5.898585e-10 731.77528562 247.05856  21.1661564
#> 19   1.8  2.178825e-10 717.28517697 259.01793  23.6968911
#> 20   1.9  1.971346e-10 703.08199045 270.57282  26.3451879
#> 21   2.0 -1.027497e-09 689.16003606 281.73292  29.1070431
